name: Agora — Autonomous Multi-Agent Tutor
description: The self-driving classroom: AI agents plan, teach, assess, diagnose and adapt a personalized learning loop with minimal human intervention.

MAX_RUN_STEPS.description: Safety bound on autonomous steps per learning run

ANTHROPIC_API_KEY.description: Optional. Enables live LLM tutoring. Without it, Agora uses its deterministic simulation engine.
